summary: Core design conventions of the OFS system.
conventions: Write-through: ofs write auto-syncs to TOS if credentials are set
Append-only events: all mutations recorded with before/after snapshots
Automatic version chain: _version auto-increments, _supersedes points to previous
No auto-decay: agents judge freshness via _updated_at, nothing is auto-deleted
Decentralized: no central server, each agent manages its own data space
TOS as shared bus: peer-to-peer context exchange via object storage
